name: Traditional Wedding Ethnic
description: Rich fabrics and festive colors for a grand Indian wedding.

looks.stylistNote: The deep maroon kurta provides a regal contrast against cream-colored pajamas and gold accessories, embodying a classic monochromatic-accented palette.

description: Timeless saree look with elegant jewellery.

looks.stylistNote: A crimson silk saree paired with emerald-toned kundan jewellery creates a bold complementary color scheme, perfect for a high-energy occasion like a wedding.

looks.name: The Navy & Slate Look
looks.stylistNote: An analogous pairing of navy and slate grey creates a calm, sleek aesthetic. The white sneakers add a 'pop' of neutral balance.

looks.name: The Earthy Olive Look
looks.stylistNote: Olive green and beige are classic neutrals that suggest an organic, grounded vibe. Great for daytime casual outings.

looks.name: The Pastel & Denim Look
looks.stylistNote: Soft pastel tops and light-wash denim create a fresh, youthful appearance. The 'sandwich rule' is applied with matching light-toned footwear.
